name: Naveta des Tudons
description: Menorca's best-preserved Talayotic funerary monument and a symbol of the island. It is part of Talayotic Menorca, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 2023.

practicalInfo.acceso: Beside the Me-1 road, with signposted parking

planner.effortNote: Car park beside the Me-1 road (km ~40) + short 5-min walk on a firm dirt track. No shade: avoid midday in summer.
planner.seasonalHours: Morning or late afternoon; any season. Best light and least heat early or late in the day.
highlights: the best-preserved talayotic funerary monument on the island
a short stop beside the Me-1, ideal on the way between Ciutadella and the centre
go first or last thing in the day: there is no shade
